text:
Order of the Supreme Court
Judgment
Prashant Kumar Mishra, J.
Appeal arising out of Criminal Appeal Diary No. 45480 of 2024 is 
admitted.
2. 
The three appellants before us namely, Shanmugam @ 
Lakshminarayanan in Criminal Appeal No. 5245 of 2024 (Contemnor 
No. 4 before the High Court), M. Muruganandam in Criminal Appeal 
No. 4219 of 2024 (Contemnor No. 3 before the High Court) and S. 
Amal Raj in Criminal Appeal arising out of Criminal Appeal Diary 
No. 45480 of 2024 (Contemnor No. 7 before the High Court) stand 
convicted by the High Court for committing contempt of Court and 
have been sentenced to undergo simple imprisonment for a period 
of six months. The appellants have called in question the legality and 
validity of the judgment and order of the High Court in the present 
appeals. 
FACTUAL MATRIX
3. 
The District Munsiff Court, Tiruchengode passed a decree dated 
17.11.2004 in O.S. No. 212 of 2000 in favour of J.K.K. Rangammal
